ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the electronic component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., IC, resistor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component category */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component manufacturer */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component distributor */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES component_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES component_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES component_distributors ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Supply range, Quiescent current) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "test_conditions_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if test conditions are required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter the specification belongs to */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" TEXT /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "test_conditions_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test conditions for the specification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the specification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test condition */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specification the test condition belongs to */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the test condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_conditions_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES specifications ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the component data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Log of changes made in this version */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the status belongs to */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the status became effective */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who updated the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_status_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_status_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the component category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the component manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manufacturer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the component distributor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the distributor */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the distributor's website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distributor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distributor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the pricing belongs to */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price for the component */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency for the unit price */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the pricing became effective */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_pricing_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES component_distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_pricing_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the order is for */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of components ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, fulfilled) */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_orders_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES component_distributors ("distributor_id")
)
